title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a no-code calendar app using Google AI Studio and Gemini. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations using advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a no-code calendar app in Google AI Studio, using Gemini to extract travel itineraries and convert them into calendar invitations. It shows Gemini's reasoning capabilities applied to the task along with error troubleshooting during the build. The takeaway is a concrete demonstration of code generation and conversational AI inside AI Studio, completed in roughly six minutes.
